title: AWeber vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Sendinblue?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $25/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to AWeber is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
